intro: Aloe vera tincture is a concentrated liquid extract made from the gel of the aloe vera plant, often used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. This tincture can be applied topically to skin irritations, such as burns, cuts, and eczema, to promote healing and reduce discomfort. Aloe vera tincture is also believed to have internal benefits, including aiding digestion and supporting immune function when taken orally.
